meaning: n.[璇璢鍒掑垎闊宠妭,鎸夐煶鑺傜殑鍙戦煶
examples: This paper proposes a syllabification algorithm based on constraint tree, in which morphological rules constraint, metrical rules constraint and phonotactic rules constraint are imposed.
Through analyzing those words, it is used to validate that whether the syllables of Standard Chinese (Mandarin) follows one general principle of syllabification: Minimal Onset Satisfaction.
